title: $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT
text: $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT Determines the default value of the x-id placeholder attribute for fields in static server pages. $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT { = } 1 | 0 Values 1 — webgen generates an id attribute based on the name attribute of the field. This is equivalent to adding x-id="1" to each <xsubst type=" FieldType "> tag in USP layouts. 0 — webgen does not generate an id attribute with the same value as the name attribute. This is equivalent to adding x-id="0" to each <xsubst type=" FieldType "> tag for fields in the USP layout. Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [WEB] Default value: 0 Description By default, webgen does not generate id attributes for the XHTML controls that represent Uniface fields in static server pages. It is possible to change this behavior globally by setting $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT to 1 , or locally by adding x-id="1" to the <x-subst type=" FieldType "> . You can add the instance name of the USP to the id by setting $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME . For more information, see the "x-id" topic. Example: Generating id Attributes by Default [WEB] $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT = True ; cause webgen to generate id attributes for fields $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME = True ; cause webgen to append the USP instance name to the id attribute Copy Related Links webgen Generate an XHTML document from the layout definition and the component definition of a static server page. $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME Determines whether webgen appends the instance name of the static server page to the id attribute that it generates for the x-id placeholder attribute. <x-subst type="WidgetType"> XHTML placeholder for the USP widget and field data that will be generated in the HTML sent to the browser.
